blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,845 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
